Title: Automated periodic report of status and location changes
Descirption: Generate and distribute a periodic report of LEAMS asset status changes (Scrap, Obsolescence, Not in use) and location changes (cost center/entity transfers, temporary vs permanent) to Finance without requiring LEAMS access.
Benefit Hypothesis: Finance receives timely, complete change data to prepare documentation, approvals, and assess financial statement impacts without manual follow-ups.
Acceltance Criteria: Given the reporting job runs on the agreed cadence; When Finance receives the report; Then it includes each asset change once with asset ID, previous/new status, previous/new location, temporary/permanent indicator, and timestamp.

Title: Confirm reporting cadence and delivery method
Descirption: Agree with Finance on the reporting cadence (daily/weekly/monthly) and delivery channel(s) (email/shared drive) for the periodic LEAMS change report.
Benefit Hypothesis: A clear cadence and delivery channel ensures the report reaches Finance consistently and supports audit readiness.
Acceltance Criteria: Given Finance confirms preferred cadence and delivery channel(s); When the decision is documented; Then the report schedule and distribution list are approved and ready for implementation.
